'''âv-n-b-p''' ('''kavanbepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylosylate|xylosylate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-n-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylosylate|xylosylate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-n-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| kavanbepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivanbepoko|thivanbepoko]] || [[word:jivanbepoko|jivanbepoko]] || [[word:shivanbepoko|shivanbepoko]] || [[word:kivanbepoko|kivanbepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvanbepoko|thuthuvanbepoko]] || [[word:jujuvanbepoko|jujuvanbepoko]] || [[word:shushuvanbepoko|shushuvanbepoko]] || [[word:kukuvanbepoko|kukuvanbepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuvanbepoko|thuvanbepoko]] || [[word:juvanbepoko|juvanbepoko]] || [[word:shuvanbepoko|shuvanbepoko]] || [[word:kuvanbepoko|kuvanbepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuvanbepoko|thuvanbepoko]] || [[word:juvanbepoko|juvanbepoko]] || [[word:shuvanbepoko|shuvanbepoko]] || [[word:kuvanbepoko|kuvanbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thevanbepoko|thevanbepoko]] || [[word:jevanbepoko|jevanbepoko]] || [[word:shevanbepoko|shevanbepoko]] || [[word:kevanbepoko|kevanbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothovanbepoko|thothovanbepoko]] || [[word:jojovanbepoko|jojovanbepoko]] || [[word:shoshovanbepoko|shoshovanbepoko]] || [[word:kokovanbepoko|kokovanbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thovanbepoko|thovanbepoko]] || [[word:jovanbepoko|jovanbepoko]] || [[word:shovanbepoko|shovanbepoko]] || [[word:kovanbepoko|kovanbepoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovanbepoko|thovanbepoko]] || [[word:jovanbepoko|jovanbepoko]] || [[word:shovanbepoko|shovanbepoko]] || [[word:kovanbepoko|kovanbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠvanbepoko|thĂŠvanbepoko]] || [[word:jĂŠvanbepoko|jĂŠvanbepoko]] || [[word:shĂŠvanbepoko|shĂŠvanbepoko]] || [[word:kĂŠvanbepoko|kĂŠvanbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathavanbepoko|thathavanbepoko]] || [[word:jajavanbepoko|jajavanbepoko]] || [[word:shashavanbepoko|shashavanbepoko]] || [[word:kakavanbepoko|kakavanbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thavanbepoko|thavanbepoko]] || [[word:javanbepoko|javanbepoko]] || [[word:shavanbepoko|shavanbepoko]] || [[word:kavanbepoko|kavanbepoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thavanbepoko|thavanbepoko]] || [[word:javanbepoko|javanbepoko]] || [[word:shavanbepoko|shavanbepoko]] || [[word:kavanbepoko|kavanbepoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
